summary:
Fixed the rating filter logic that caused incorrect results.

Changes made:
1. utils.js  
   • Parse min_rating as a number with parseInt instead of leaving it a string.

2. filter.js  
   • Simplified rating filter: directly compare numeric rating (p.rating >= query.minRating) instead of building an array of acceptable values that mixed strings and numbers.  
   • Removed now-unused buildRatingRange export.

All tests in test.sh now pass.
